sanskrit:
नान्तोऽस्ति मम दिव्यानां विभूतीनां परन्तप।
एष तूद्देशतः प्रोक्तो विभूतेर्विस्तरो मया॥
transliteration:
nānto ’sti mama divyānāṁ vibhūtīnāṁ parantapa |
eṣa tūddeśataḥ prokto vibhūter vistaro mayā ||
literal_meaning: There is no end to My divine manifestations; what has been declared is only a partial indication of My limitless opulences.
contextual_meaning: The mind’s attempt to fully map the Self is inherently limited; any self-concept is only a thumbnail sketch of the boundless awareness that underlies it.
psychological_state: Healthy surrender of the need for total intellectual mastery; shift from egoic knowing to contemplative unknowing.
trigger_scenario: A high-achieving professional realizes their exhaustive self-knowledge app captures only a sliver of who they are, evoking both wonder and subtle vertigo.
anchor_text: You are more than any thought can hold.
